mapper.select: SELECT id, openid, unionid, nickname, avatar_url, gender, province, city, area, create_time, update_time, modify_at, status FROM maozhua_user_info WHERE openid = #{openid} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO maozhua_user_info ( openid, unionid, nickname, avatar_url, gender, province, city, area, create_time, update_time, status ) VALUES ( #{openid}, #{unionid}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{gender}, #{province}, #{city}, #{area}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{status} )
